description_long: This stool features a round, slightly concave seat with a smooth, dark wood finish, giving it a refined and minimalist appearance. The stool is supported by three slender, gently tapering legs that extend seamlessly from the seat, creating a fluid and organic silhouette. The legs are evenly spaced and curve subtly outward, providing stability while maintaining an elegant profile. There are no visible joints, fasteners, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing the clean and modern design. The surface appears polished and hard, with a subtle sheen that highlights the natural wood grain. This stool would fit well in urban public spaces such as parks, cafes, or galleries, offering a simple yet stylish seating option.
description: A sleek, dark wooden stool with a round seat and three slender, outward-curving legs, finished in a smooth, polished style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round seat and three evenly spaced, slender legs with a slight outward curve.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth taper of the legs and the seamless transition from seat to leg.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, emphasizing the symmetry and clean lines of the stool's design.
description_view_3: Alternate side view showing the gentle outward curve of the legs and the polished seat surface.
